  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "DTI squirter washers not fully crushed, indicating the structural bolts have not been tensioned to the required minimum pretension."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Tighten the structural bolts using an approved method until the DTI squirter washers show the required amount of silicone extrusion (or gap reduction) per manufacturer and RCSC specifications."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under the RCSC Specification, Direct Tension Indicators (DTIs) must be compressed to the point where the specified number of gaps are refused, or for squirter DTIs, the silicone media is sufficiently extruded to indicate that the minimum bolt pretension has been achieved. Uncrushed DTIs mean the connection is not properly tensioned.",
  "references": [
    "RCSC Specification for Structural Joints Using High-Strength Bolts, Section 8.2.4"
  ]
}
